data.name: Sexbot II: Recalibrated
data.detailed_description:
The Sequel to Sexbot, now in development.

New features include:

  • A phone interface to access the gallery, text messages, and character stats at anytime.

  • Selectable animated character idle animations, that unlock as you discover new outfits.

  • Improved day and night cycles and environments.

  • Fun and exciting scenes that hit the ground running, right where you left off.

  • New loops and story lines for every character

  • MC takes his glasses off to sleep

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:

  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: All characters in this game are still fictional robots or humans, not related to each other, and over the age of 18.
